To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Coral Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder.

Please note that the airport lounge access on Credit Card benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria, click here. To view the complete list of lounges,  click here .

To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Coral Credit Card in a Spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder.
Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here .
